{{CargoRelic
|name=Maglev Iron Ball
|class_id=20341
|rank=Green
|affct=TECH
|source=
|description=After Big Guy Park founded the Ironball Sect, he decided to integrate modern technology with traditional martial arts to make a breakthrough. One of the most notable achievements is this levitating magnetic iron ball; it can greatly reduce the user's encumbrance and fatigue, and can still wreak havoc in a fight!
|fame=15
|art=11
|fth=17
|civ=16
|tech=31
|ss1=Per 10 Ironball Throwers in battle:<br>> Troop RUSH +1
|ss2=Per 10 Ironball Throwers in battle:<br>> Troop RUSH +2
|ss3=Per 10 Ironball Throwers in battle:<br>> Troop RUSH +3
|ss4=Per 10 Ironball Throwers in battle:<br>> Troop RUSH +3
|ss7=Per 10 Ironball Throwers in battle:<br>> Troop RUSH +3<br> (Awakened)
}}
